site.title: Willians Tavares
site.description: Tech Lead & Full-Stack Developer specialized in .NET, Kotlin and React/TypeScript, with experience in software architecture, DevOps and cloud.

home.intro1: Hi, my name is Willians Tavares! I currently work as a Tech Lead at
home.intro2: I'm passionate about development, with a solid background in .Net, Kotlin, and Javascript. My experience also covers DevOps and Cloud using environments like Azure, Azure DevOps, and AWS.
home.intro3: My goal is to simplify complex solutions
home.intro3Rest: , seeking efficient ways to solve the challenges that arise during project development.
home.heroDescription: I'm a software developer based in Brazil. I like turning messy, complex problems into software that's simple to use and easy to maintain — and I write about what I learn along the way.
home.projectsSubtitle: A few things I've built — from productivity tools to mobile apps and small games.
home.contactSubtitle: Feel free to reach out — about code, an idea, or just to say hello.
